# awsext_connect_security_profile (Resource)

Creates and manages an Amazon Connect Security Profile (connect:CreateSecurityProfile / DescribeSecurityProfile / UpdateSecurityProfile / DeleteSecurityProfile). Fills the gap left by the official `aws_connect_security_profile` resource, which does not expose the `applications` field required for Amazon Q Connect MCP wiring.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "awsext_connect_security_profile" "aiagent_bot" {
  instance_id = "d9519e8f-2f9f-4a37-bf09-4bda8e27185d"
  name        = "bc-sonic-addservice-bot"
  description = "Security profile for the add service bot"
  permissions = ["BasicAgentAccess", "OutboundCallAccess"]

  applications = [
    {
      namespace               = "CCP"
      application_permissions = ["ACCESS"]
    },
    {
      namespace               = "AgentApplications"
      application_permissions = ["ACCESS"]
    },
    {
      namespace = "bc-sonic-addservice-api-emyj-nmpnce5jah"
      application_permissions = [
        "aiagenttools___context_get",
        "aiagenttools___context_update",
        "aiagenttools___get_date",
        "sapapi___processmoveinrequest",
      ]
    },
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) The identifier of the Amazon Connect instance. Forces replacement.
- `name` (String) The name of the security profile. Forces replacement.

### Optional

- `allowed_access_control_tags` (Map of String) The list of tags that a security profile uses to restrict access to resources in Amazon Connect. Updatable in place.
- `applications` (Attributes List) The list of third-party applications and their permissions granted to agents assigned to this security profile. Updatable in place. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--applications))
- `description` (String) The description of the security profile. Updatable in place.
- `permissions` (List of String) The list of permissions granted to agents assigned to this security profile. Updatable in place.
- `tag_restricted_resources` (List of String) The list of resources that a security profile applies tag restrictions to in Amazon Connect. Updatable in place.
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to assign to the security profile. Updatable in place.

### Read-Only

- `security_profile_arn` (String) The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the security profile.
- `security_profile_id` (String) The service-assigned identifier for the security profile.

<a id="nestedatt--applications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `applications`

Required:

- `application_permissions` (List of String) The permissions granted to the third-party application.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace of the third-party application.
